title: Soulful Japa : Session 1 : Lord Sri Krishna has incarnated again as Nama Avatara-Module 1
speaker: HG Madhu Pandit Dasa

segments.text: Hare Krishna! We all start today a series of video talk on soulful japa and it is going
to be basically following the japa modules that I have posted in telegram and whatsapp
group. So today we will be talking about module 1 and module 2 and also I will take question
and try to answer these questions on these two modules. So the module 1 is about a great
news.
In modern times the great news is about the incarnation of the Lord. He is present on
the earth today! Just like we say 5000 years back Lord appeared in Vrindavan and 500 years
back Lord appeared in.. same Lord appeared as Bhaktavatara in Nauvadi. In the same vrat
of Lord.
way chaitanya mahaprabhu said kalikale krishna he revealed this great secret that krishna has
incarnated in his name and specifically chaitanya mahaprabhu spread the form of the name
so lord in this particular form of hare krishna nama he is we will refer to this avatara as nama
every incarnation does specific leelas so naturally we expect just like krishna came
5000 years back so many leelas he did
you
chaitanya mahaprabhu came he did so many leelas with his devotees in the same way
nama prabhu is also engaged in unlimited leelas on this earth right now
thousands of devotees they are participating in this leela
participating means just like chaitanya mahaprabhu he gave out his mercy to so many living entities
by distributing the holy name in the same way anybody who has received this hare krishna
mahamantra fortunate to receive this hare krishna
mahamantra and especially to follow a pure devotee of this Hare Krishnamahamantra like
his divine grace a.c bhaktivedanta Swami Srila prabhupada he's really very blessed and they are very
much part of chaitanya mahaprabhu's leela krishnas leela nama prabhu's leela amitabha's leela a.c he represents divine grace sm Forsakenness in existence.
fort hath eram kali toku Chaitanya mahapraboos leela Krishnas leela nama praboos leela

Chaitanya Mahaprabhu's Lila, Krishna's Lila, Nama Prabhu's Lila. So we should feel very, very blessed in the modern times if we have got an opportunity to know and associate with the Hare Krishna Mahamantra.

And what is the specific Lila of the Hare Krishna Mahamantra? What is the specific Lila of Nama Prabhu? The specific Lila of Nama Prabhu is that when you chant the Hare Krishna Mahamantra with your tongue, with your material tongue, the Lord descends into that sound, the Hare Krishna Mahamantra, the spiritual sound.
Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Hare.
There is a spiritual sound, that sound that we chant with our tongue, because the tongue is material. It's a material sound, sound of matter.
And in that sound produced by matter, the matter vibration, into that sound, a sound from the spiritual world, Shuddha Nama, Nama Prabhu.
He takes...
He takes an avatara and enters into this sound.
And this sound is no longer an ordinary sound, the sound that is generated with the, with
your material tongue is no longer an ordinary sound.
And that's called Shakti Avesh Avatara.
That sound of the Lord, his Lila continues. First he descends into the sound.
Then you hear that sound.
The Lord enters our ears and then into our heart.
And these Lila's continue.
What is the Lila?
After he enters his heart, the Lord is like the sun of Satchitananda.
Just like sun is a brilliant light and heat, in the same way Lord is a brilliant sign of
Satchitananda.
His Satchitananda energies flow into the soul when the Nama reaches our heart.
And this way we become purified, our heart becomes purified.
Satt means eternity, Chitta means pure knowledge, who I am, who is God and Ananda is experience
of love and pleasure in serving the Supreme Lord.
So Lord, Lord's incarnation as Nama Prabhu means, he, first he descends into the Nama
that you chant with your tongue, then through the ears, he enters our hearts and, and in
the heart, there something called Chetodakpanam happens.
Our hearts are cleansed of ignorance because the name of the Lord is pure knowledge.
Yes.
That pure knowledge goes inside our heart and it churns our Chitta, our consciousness,
our memories, everything, it cleanses, cleanses and then we experience what is self-realization
and God-realization.
So this is the specific Lila of Nama Prabhu.
Now today it is happening all over the world and everything that has happened in your life
is not as important as the Nama Prabhu.
Yes.
It is the greatest blessing to receive this Hare Krishna Maha Mantra and to serve the
Hare Krishna Maha Mantra every day.
And this, this Nama, Nama Prabhu was taken all over the world by none other than Bhaktivedanta
Swami Srila Prabhupada.
Just see, Nama, Nama Prabhu is a present incarnation of Lord Krishna on this earth.
He is performing his Lilas in thousands and thousands of souls, in relationship, thousands
and thousands of living entities who are all chanting Hare Krishna.
And the Lila is that of Chetodakpanam Arjanam, purifying and awakening their Krishna consciousness.
So we should feel just like if somebody told.
That, you know, you were very much part of Krishna's Lila 5000 years back, how will you
feel?
Oh, that's great.
Really?
I, what was I?
They'll say the same way.
We are all having the same good fortune out of 7.7 billion people on this earth.
Few people have got this great opportunity to vibrate the Hare Krishna Maha Mantra on
their tongue.
To welcome the Nama.
Incarnation Nama Prabhu and to get the association of the Supreme Lord in the form of his Nama.
So this is a way we should see.
Just like if you say Krishna is 5000 years back, he came and we on the globe.
There is the Supreme Lord present.
That's how we would say.
Oh, Krishna is there.
He's born there.
And he's doing his Lila.
Exactly in the same way.
Now, the Lord is more liberal, not Vrindavan.
On every tongue, he's ready to come.
And when you chant, he comes.
Therefore, he's called Namo Mahavadanyaya, the most merciful incarnation of the Lord.
Just like if you want to go, if you want to see Archa Vigraha, you go to a temple and
have darshan.
You want to.
But here simply vibrate your tongue.
God is there.
God is there.
God is there.

God is there.

God is there.
God is there present on your tongue.
And then that is the greatest fortune of people of Kali Yuga.
And Prabhupada was the chosen devotee of the Lord who took this name all over the world.
Once Prabhupada was asked, Srila Prabhupada, if Chaitanya Maha Prabhu wanted his name to
be spread all over the world.
Why didn't Chaitanya Mahaprabhu himself go to the Western world?
Why didn't he himself go all over the world 500 years back?
Srila Prabhupada laughed and said,
Yes, Chaitanya Mahaprabhu wanted to give that credit to me.
So Srila Prabhupada actually was blessed by Chaitanya Mahaprabhu
to take this nama all over the world.
And when you are in Vrindavan,
you should...
There is something very important in this connection of nama vathara,
I want to say.
Srila Prabhupada, before he went to America,
he stayed in Vrindavan for six years
in Radha Damodara temple.
And that Radha Damodara temple
is very much part of the...
Leelas of the Lord.
Lord Krishna.
It's one corner of the
Seva Kunj
where Krishna performed his Rasa dance.
And that Radha Damodara temple is a location
where Rupa Goswami Samadhi is there,
Srila Jeeva Goswami Samadhi is there.
You are all aware that
our leaders of our parampara are the six Goswamis,
the original leaders.
Because Chaitanya Mahaprabhu,
who directly instructed them
what is Krishna consciousness,
the entire science of Krishna consciousness
to the six Goswamis.

they prepared all this literature

which Prabhupada has translated
and Prabhupada is further writing.
And all this knowledge is coming
from the six Goswamis.
And the leader of all the six Goswamis
was Rupa Goswami.
And Rupa Goswami's Samadhi
is situated in Radha Damodara temple.
And Prabhupada,
Prabhupada spent six years
staying in Radha Damodara temple.
Across the window,
he could see Rupa Goswami Samadhi
and he was intensely praying to Rupa Goswami Samadhi
and he was intensely praying to Jeeva Goswami,
Rupa Goswami.
And he had darshan of Rupa Goswami
and Jeeva Goswami live.
Though 500 years back,
they had left this mortal body,
but they appeared to Chaitanya Mahaprabhu,
Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada,
they blessed him
and empowered him
to write about Krishna consciousness
and preach all over the world.
So this Hare Krishna movement
is directly
an expansion
of Chaitanya Mahaprabhu,
the six Goswamis
and that is how this movement
is spreading all over the world.
So we are all very fortunate
to have this kind of an opportunity
to pray to Rupa Goswami.
So we are all very fortunate
to have this kind of an opportunity
to chant the Hare Krishna Mahamantra.
to chant the Hare Krishna Mahamantra.
to chant the Hare Krishna Mahamantra.
Now, the most important thing,
the Lord has appeared,
he has incarnated,
he has incarnated,
once he has incarnated,
we need to ...
the Lord is,
we know that the Lord is present before us.
When he is present before us,
we have to receive him properly.
We have to honour him properly.
And how do you honour a sound?
We have to honor the sound of the sound,
By attentively hearing the sound, chanting with devotion and receiving him with relish,
happily, heartfully, we should receive the avatar.
So Srila Prabhupada, basically now our challenge before us,
Lord has incarnated, he is on my tongue, he is ready to go into my heart and cleanse my heart.
But then, how effectively this happens depends a lot on whether you allow the Holy Name to go inside your heart.
The Lord is on the tongue, but will you allow yours?
There is a way, there is a particular...
consciousness by which the Lord goes into our heart.
So this soulful japa series, I called it soulful because we have to soulfully receive the Lord
and we have to soulfully serve the Lord.
And what is this soulful receiving, soulful welcoming and soulful association of,
the Supreme Lord in the nama form, that the series of this we will discuss in more and more videos.
Thank you for being with me today. Hare Krishna.
